$comment: Compiler performance options injected into QueryOptions at runtime. Kept separate from the base graph_query.schema.json to reduce token usage for LLM consumers.

skip_dedup.description: Skip ReplacingMergeTree deduplication for node tables. Recommended for code graph traversals (CALLS, DEFINES, EXTENDS, IMPORTS) where eventual consistency is acceptable. Not allowed for aggregation queries.

materialize_ctes.description: Materialize multi-referenced CTEs for reduced redundant scans.

use_semi_join.description: Rewrite IN-subquery SIP patterns to LEFT SEMI JOIN.

auth_scope_cascade.description: Force auth-scoped cascade seeding on every query. When false (default), auth-scoped cascades only fire when no node has node_ids — pinned-node cascades provide better narrowing.

cascade_distinct.description: Emit SELECT DISTINCT on cascade and hop frontier CTEs. When false (default), IN already deduplicates internally and DISTINCT adds a blocking barrier.

use_v2.description: Use the v2 skeleton-first compiler. Edges drive, nodes are lazy lookups, zero CTEs. Falls back to v1 for PathFinding and Neighbors.
